# Muammer Kizilaslan — Executive IT Leader

## Summary
Muammer Kizilaslan is Vice President IT & Digital at Hansgrohe SE, a global leader in sanitary fittings. He has 20+ years of international IT leadership experience across three Fortune-level corporations (Hansgrohe, Borusan Mannesmann, BSH Home Appliances) in three countries (Germany, Turkey, Italy).

## Current Role
- **Title:** Vice President IT & Digital
- **Company:** Hansgrohe SE, Schiltach, Germany
- **Since:** 2021
- **Scope:** Leading the most comprehensive IT and digital transformation in the company's recent history, including SAP S/4HANA enterprise conversion, cloud strategy, AI integration, and a global delivery hub model. Responsible for 160+ employees and IT budgets in the double-digit million range.

## Previous Roles
- **Chief Digital Officer & Board Member** at Borusan Mannesmann, Istanbul (2019–2021): Developed company-wide digital strategy, supply chain digitalization, Industry 4.0 roadmap.
- **13+ years at BSH Home Appliances** (2006–2019): Five leadership roles across Munich, Istanbul, and Milan — from Senior BI Engineer to Head of IT Factories. Built a global BI Center of Excellence and led one of the world's largest SAP BW on HANA transformation projects.

## Core Expertise
- Strategic IT leadership & P&L ownership
- AI & intelligent automation (Agentic AI, LLM integration, predictive analytics)
- Enterprise architecture (SAP S/4HANA, hybrid cloud, zero trust)
- International scaling & post-merger integration
- Industry 4.0, IoT, manufacturing digitalization

## Languages
- German (native), Turkish (native), English (business fluent), Italian (basic)

## Contact
- Email: Muammer.Kizilaslan@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/muammer-kizilaslan
- Website: muammerkizilaslan.com
